objective: Plan authority-free discovery, exact CollaborationTerms negotiation, semantic and action profile mapping, and bounded external-protocol bindings.
falsifiable_claim: Discovery and protocol completion grant nothing; accepted, countered, declined, expired, or amended terms and mapping risks remain explicit and non-retroactive.
exit_criteria: Accept, counter, decline, expiry, non-retroactive amendment, and mapping-risk cases pass.
Discovery grants nothing and A2A, MCP, HTTP, or directory completion never becomes IOI authority, verification, or acceptance.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M12_TERMS_DISCOVERY_SEMANTIC_NEGOTIATION_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Replay, alter, expire, retroactively amend, or cross-bind discovery, terms roots, semantic maps, action profiles, external endpoints, protocol identities, and acceptance decisions.
remaining_nonclaims: No raw private context, shared database, settlement, positive surplus, or stage closure.
External protocol interoperability is not AIIP authority or verification.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 61eba1802992c01efa7d3188184ff315ad9d2ba0; status transaction 2026-07-22.
